api/client/javascript.purpose: Published npm package (@openmeter/sdk) orchestrating code generation (openapi-typescript + orval), a dual ESM/CJS build (duel), and four named sub-package exports (default admin client, /portal, /react, /zod). All src/ files are either generated or thin wrappers; dist/ is the published artifact.

patterns.name: Generated-first src/client/schemas.ts
patterns.description: schemas.ts is regenerated by scripts/generate.ts via openapi-typescript on api/openapi.cloud.yaml. Never hand-edit — changes are lost on the next generate:client.
patterns.example: pnpm run generate:client  # tsx scripts/generate.ts && biome format --write ./src/client/schemas.ts

patterns.name: Orval for Zod schemas
patterns.description: src/zod/index.ts is produced by orval using orval.config.ts (input ../../openapi.cloud.yaml, PascalCase, coercion). Never edit directly.
patterns.example: pnpm run generate:zod  # orval && tsx scripts/add-as-const.ts && biome lint+format

patterns.name: Four named sub-package exports
patterns.description: package.json exports map '.', './portal', './react', './zod' to separate dist entry points. New resource classes go in src/client/ and must be registered on the root OpenMeter class.

patterns.name: Dual ESM/CJS build via duel
patterns.description: Build script is `duel`, producing dist/*.js (ESM) and dist/cjs/*.cjs (CJS); tsconfig uses module=NodeNext, moduleResolution=nodenext.

patterns.name: openapi-typescript patched at install time
patterns.description: pnpm.patchedDependencies applies patches/openapi-typescript.patch to the installed package's dist/; the patch must be regenerated after any openapi-typescript upgrade.

patterns.name: Biome as sole linter/formatter
patterns.description: biome.json (not eslint/prettier) enforces useConst, useAsConstAssertion, noUselessElse, single quotes, no semicolons. useSortedKeys is disabled for package.json via override.

patterns.name: Type overrides via openapiTS transform hook
patterns.description: date-time -> Date overrides are applied in scripts/generate.ts via the openapiTS transform hook during AST traversal, not post-hoc regex.
patterns.example: // scripts/generate.ts: transform hook intercepts SchemaObject nodes during the openapiTS run

key_file_guides.role: Defines the four sub-package exports, the pnpm patch for openapi-typescript, generate/build/test scripts, and the react >=18 peer dependency.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding an export path requires updating 'exports' AND ensuring duel emits the matching file. patchedDependencies hash goes stale after upgrading openapi-typescript.

key_file_guides.role: Drives orval Zod schema generation for src/zod/index.ts; input ../../openapi.cloud.yaml, PascalCase, coercion enabled for body/param/query.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Changing the input path breaks generation if the relative URL from the package root does not resolve; orval must be run from the package root.

key_file_guides.role: Strict TS config, module=NodeNext; excludes test files, scripts/, and *.config.ts; includes src/react/**/*.tsx for JSX.
key_file_guides.watch_for: scripts/**/*.ts and *.config.ts are excluded — type errors in build scripts are silent unless run separately with tsc.

key_file_guides.role: Single consolidated patch applied to openapi-typescript dist/ via pnpm patchedDependencies; carries all local fixes not yet upstream.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Stale patch base hash after upgrading openapi-typescript causes pnpm install to fail; regenerate the patch after each upgrade.

key_file_guides.role: Root entry — re-exports everything from src/client/index.js only; portal, react, and zod are separate sub-package exports, not re-exported here.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not add logic or additional exports here; only the admin client is re-exported from the root.

key_file_guides.role: Runs openapi-typescript on openapi.cloud.yaml to produce src/client/schemas.ts, applying type overrides via the transform hook.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Must run from the package root — the relative URL to openapi.cloud.yaml depends on it.

key_file_guides.role: Temporary orval workaround that transforms generated src/zod/index.ts; clearly labelled throwaway.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Build-time tool only, not imported by app code; do not add permanent logic here.

key_file_guides.role: Sole linter/formatter config with strict style rules; useSortedKeys disabled for package.json via override.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not add eslint or prettier config — Biome is the single source of truth for formatting and linting.

anti_patterns: Hand-editing src/client/schemas.ts or src/zod/index.ts — both are generated and overwritten by pnpm run generate.
Adding admin-level endpoints to src/portal/ — the portal client is intentionally restricted to portal-token-scoped operations.
Adding new resource classes to src/client/ without registering them on the root OpenMeter class in src/client/index.ts.
Running scripts/generate.ts from a directory other than the package root — the relative URL to openapi.cloud.yaml fails to resolve.
Creating multiple patch files instead of the single consolidated patches/openapi-typescript.patch — pnpm patchedDependencies expects one file per package.

decisions.decision: openapi-typescript is patched at the dist/ level rather than forked.
decisions.rationale: Allows tracking upstream releases while carrying local fixes; the patch is reapplied by pnpm at install time and must be regenerated after each upgrade.

decisions.decision: Four distinct sub-package exports instead of a single entry point.
decisions.rationale: Admin client, portal client, React integration, and Zod schemas have different runtime deps and bundle sizes; splitting lets consumers tree-shake and avoid pulling react or zod unless needed.

decisions.decision: Type overrides via the openapiTS transform hook in scripts/generate.ts, not post-hoc regex.
decisions.rationale: The transform hook runs during AST traversal so the override is type-safe and stable across openapi-typescript upgrades; regex post-processing is fragile and order-dependent.

code_examples.scenario: Full SDK generation + build pipeline after OpenAPI spec changes
code_examples.code:
# From api/client/javascript/
pnpm --frozen-lockfile install
pnpm run generate        # generate:client (openapi-typescript) + generate:zod (orval)
pnpm run build           # duel ESM+CJS build -> dist/
pnpm run lint            # tsc --noEmit && biome lint .
pnpm run test            # vitest --run
